githubTokenHelp: Optional. Increases the API rate limit from 60 to 5000 requests/hour. Token needs no permissions (public repos only).
checkIntervalHelp: How often to check for updates (in seconds). Minimum 600 s (10 min).
autoUpdateHelp: Automatically update all detected adapters as soon as an update is found.
excludeAdaptersHelp: Comma-separated list of adapter names to skip, e.g. my-adapter,other-adapter
